name: How much is my occupational lung disease case worth in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How much is my occupational lung disease case worth in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covers medical, wages; value based on disability extent—no pain/suffering cap in comp.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value includes medical costs, lost wages (past/future), and temporary benefits; no pain/suffering in standard workers' comp.[1] Settlements vary by severity and earning capacity.[1] Key factors: Total disability maxes benefits; calculate diminished capacity; third-party suits add noneconomic damages.[1] Get a case evaluation from an attorney using your records. Avoid settling too early without full assessment.
